audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L103-105 uses `msg.sender != address(s_auction) || from != address(this)` which is De Morgan-equivalent to enforcing both `msg.sender == s_auction AND from == address(this)`. The only external call site (BaseAuction.sol:449) correctly passes `from = msg.sender = address(AuctionBidder)`, satisfying both conditions. No bypass path exists: `s_auction` is admin-controlled, non-zero, and no reentrancy vector can swap it mid-transaction.
